name: opencode
description: Use opencode from Codex for code review, investigation, and delegated CLI runs.

interface.shortDescription: Run opencode review and delegation workflows from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex-native wrapper around the opencode CLI with review, run, setup, status, result, cancel, and gate support where Codex plugin surfaces allow it.
defaultPrompt: Run an opencode task in the background.
